title: OpenAI announces a new multimodal model release
summary: OpenAI described a new multimodal model release with stronger reasoning, tool use, and developer-facing API updates.
claims: OpenAI described a new multimodal model release with stronger reasoning, tool use, and developer-facing API updates.

title: Browser Use ships a CLI workflow for coding agents
summary: Browser Use added a CLI workflow for browser automation, DOM state reading, screenshots, and agent-driven web tasks.
claims: Browser Use added a CLI workflow for browser automation, DOM state reading, screenshots, and agent-driven web tasks.

title: MCP TypeScript SDK updates tool schema handling
summary: The MCP TypeScript SDK release notes mention schema handling, transport fixes, and improved error semantics for tools.
claims: The MCP TypeScript SDK release notes mention schema handling, transport fixes, and improved error semantics for tools.

title: arXiv paper studies evaluation drift in multi-agent systems
summary: A paper studies evaluation drift, coordination failure, and benchmark design for multi-agent LLM systems.
claims: A paper studies evaluation drift, coordination failure, and benchmark design for multi-agent LLM systems.

title: AI safety institute publishes updated model evaluation guidance
summary: The institute published guidance on model evaluation, safety thresholds, and reporting expectations for advanced AI systems.
claims: The institute published guidance on model evaluation, safety thresholds, and reporting expectations for advanced AI systems.

title: AI HOT highlights a fast-growing open-source coding assistant
summary: AI HOT highlighted a fast-growing open-source coding assistant and linked to community discussion, but the original release still needs checking.
claims: AI HOT highlighted a fast-growing open-source coding assistant and linked to community discussion, but the original release still needs checking.
